/usr/bin/ar qc libeuxis-adapters-cpp.a "CMakeFiles/euxis-adapters-cpp.dir/src/slack.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-adapters-cpp.dir/src/telegram.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-adapters-cpp.dir/src/discord.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-adapters-cpp.dir/src/whatsapp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-adapters-cpp.dir/src/registry.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libeuxis-adapters-cpp.a
